data.narrative: Océane is a 17-year-old female working as a technician or associate professional. They have vocational or technical level education and good health. They live as: living alone. They rely on public transport or walking.

encounters.contact_narrative: Jessica is a 37-year-old female working as a machine operator or assembler. They have bachelor level education and good health. They live as: single parent. They rely on public transport or walking.
